programme.desc: Practical Bible teaching.
programme.title: Dr. David Jeremiah

programme.desc: Our Sinless Savior John Ankerberg, a Baptist minister, spreads the message of Jesus Christ among the followers and urges them to live a more spiritual life.
programme.title: John Ankerberg

programme.desc: Bridging the Gap
programme.title: Bridging the Gap

programme.desc: Mark and Trina Hankins share messages about faith, helping believers understand their identity in Christ and the Holy Spirit's role in their lives.
programme.title: Faith Is the Victory

programme.desc: Bishop T.D. Jakes offers practical and spiritual solutions to life's toughest questions, including taboos and hidden issues.
programme.title: The Potter's Touch With Bishop T.D. Jakes

programme.desc: Power for living encourages, empowers, and equips viewers to live a triumphant life with Christ.
programme.title: Bishop Dale C. Bronner

programme.desc: Join the pastoral leaders and praise-and-worship team for the Word of God from the Campus Church of Pensacola Christian College.
programme.title: Rejoice in the Lord

programme.desc: Our Sinless Savior John Ankerberg, a Baptist minister, spreads the message of Jesus Christ among the followers and urges them to live a more spiritual life.
programme.title: John Ankerberg

programme.desc: Pastor Michael Youssef proclaims God's word to all the people around the world through the ministries of Leading The Way.
programme.title: Michael A. Youssef

programme.desc: Messianic Rabbi Kirt Schneider, a Jewish believer in Jesus, shares his insights into the Old and New Testaments, provides guidance on prayer and delivers the Word of God.
programme.title: Discovering the Jewish Jesus

programme.desc: Practical Bible teaching.
programme.title: Dr. David Jeremiah

programme.desc: Hal Lindsey shares his insights into the prophecies in the Book of John.
programme.title: Hal Lindsey

programme.desc: Bible prophecy lives! Join Gary Stearman and Mondo Gonzales as they examine the end times with prophecy experts.
programme.title: Prophecy Watchers

programme.desc: Prophecy Live
programme.title: Prophecy Live

programme.desc: Cardiologist, evangelist, medical missionary and author Samuel Kojoglanian, MD, known as Dr. Sam, provides a Biblical study of the end times with geopolitical views and heartwarming medical analogies.
programme.title: Dr. Sam

programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.
programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin

programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; Creflo and his wife Taffi share their vision for everyone to understand God's love and promises.
programme.title: Creflo Dollar

programme.desc: Paula White Cain and husband Jonathan discuss real-life situations and offer practical, biblical solutions. They give down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered words and aim to share the life-changing love of Jesus through lessons or music.
programme.title: Paula Today

programme.desc: Familiar hymns and original music accompany Scripture to help one let go and surrender during a time of daily prayer and meditation.
programme.title: Reflections

programme.title: Joel Osteen

programme.desc: Shattered By Loss A young mother suddenly widowed shares the hope and courage that carried her through her darkest season.
programme.title: Life Today with James & Betty Robison

programme.desc: For over four and a half decades, Andrew has taught God's Word with clarity and simplicity, emphasizing the unconditional love and grace of God.
programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack

programme.desc: Pastors Larry and Tiz Huch teach about the blessings and miracles found in rediscovering the Judeo-Christian roots of our faith and the biblical importance of standing with the nation of Israel.
programme.title: Larry and Tiz Huch

programme.title: Jesus the Healer With Nancy Dufresne

programme.title: Creflo Dollar

programme.desc: Messianic investigator Sid Roth presents this show discussing and examining the supernatural reality and power of God.
programme.title: Sid Roth's It's Supernatural!

programme.desc: Are You Safe From Destruction? How do you stay safe in a crazy world? The only safe place is in Christ. Learn what it really means to be in Christ and how to get there.
programme.title: Rick Renner

programme.desc: Powerful, moving testimonies from top authors, leaders in faith and business, special music guests, professional athletes and many other inspiring figures.
programme.title: Ministry Now

programme.desc: Drenda's deep desire is to see you experience more of what matters in your life.
programme.title: Drenda

programme.desc: Burdened but Hopeful Missionaries work to share hope and spread the message of God's love by feeding and educating over 5,000 orphaned children who live in extreme poverty in Haiti.
programme.title: Love a Child

programme.desc: The Antichrist Beast, Pt. 1 Just as ancient Babylon persecuted those who would not worship its gods, so modern Babylon will persecute those who will not worship Revelation's "the beast and his image"; who is this beast that blasphemes God for 1,200 days?
programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor

programme.desc: Are You Safe From Destruction? How do you stay safe in a crazy world? The only safe place is in Christ. Learn what it really means to be in Christ and how to get there.
